headings.text: Questions
1- Open the "Practice-Security.evtx" file on the VM's Desktop.
Which IP performed a brute force of the THM-PC?
2- Which user has been breached as a result of the attack?
Administrator
3- What was the Logon ID of the malicious RDP login?
Note: The login you are looking for has a Logon Type 10.
4- Continue with the "Practice-Security.evtx" file on the VM's Desktop.
Which user was created by the attacker soon after the RDP login?
svcsysrestore
5- Which two privileged groups was the backdoor user added to?
(Answer in alphabetical order, e.g. "Administrators, Power Users")
Backup Operators, Remote Desktop Users
6- Does the Logon ID field match what you saw in the previous task (Yea/Nay)?
Yea
7- Open the "Practice-Sysmon.evtx" file on the VM's Desktop.
Which web browser does Sarah use to browse the web?
Google Chrome
8- Which file did Sarah download from the browser?
C:\Users\sarah.miller\Downloads\ckjg.exe
9- Which URL was the file downloaded from?
Note: Use other Sysmon events to find out!
http://gettsveriff.com/bgj3/ckjg.exe
10- Continue with the "Practice-Sysmon.evtx" file on the VM's Desktop.
Which file was created by the downloaded malware to persist on the host?
C:\Users\sarah.miller\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft\Windows\Start Menu\Programs\Startup\DeleteApp.url
11- What is the Command & Control server malware connected to?
12- Finally, which domain does the malicious IP correspond to?
hkfasfsafg.click
13- Review the Administrator's PS history on the attached VM.
Which PowerShell command was executed first?
Get-ComputerInfo
14- When did the Administrator run the first PS command? (Format: April 18, 2025)
15- Can you find the flag stored in the PowerShell history? (Format: THM{...})
THM{itwasme!}

workflow: Identify the user, host, process, network flow, or identity object involved.
Collect the highest-value logs first and preserve timestamps and assumptions.
Pivot through related notes, telemetry sources, and MITRE references.
Document findings, gaps, containment options, and detection improvements.
